title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. Layers: (1) prevFgHint early capture before EnsureCdpConnection, (2) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) not SW_MINIMIZE(6), (3) ForceForegroundWindow(AttachThreadInput) replacing silent-fail SetForegroundWindowRaw, (4) StartFocusWatchdog 200ms background loop during entire ask op, (5) RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync retry loop (150ms / 5s timeout) per step, (6) FocuslessWarningOverlay + ActionApi.OnFocusStealer prop stamp. AutoHeal partial: AutoBugReport (Slack) already fires via OnFocusStealer inside RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync. FireAutoHeal (AI triad analysis) NOT yet triggered -- only meaningful when 5s restore timeout is exhausted (mechanical fix failed = structural problem needing AI analysis). FireAutoHeal is NOT appropriate on every theft -- only on unrecoverable cases.
steps: 1. prevFgGemini = GetForegroundWindow() BEFORE EnsureCdpConnection (not after tab switch)
2. EnsureCdpReadyAsync(prevFgHint) -- uses hint so EnsureCdp uses correct pre-switch prevFg
3. StartFocusWatchdog(prevFg, cdp) -- 200ms poll, Chrome-PID filter, ForceForegroundWindow per tick
4. GuardCdpFocusTheft after each insert step -- Task.Run RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync fire-and-forget
5. LogRestoreFocus at send/complete checkpoints -- delegates to RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync (fire-and-forget)
6. RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: snapshot IME+cursor -> OnFocusStealer(AutoBugReport+overlay) -> retry loop -> restore IME+cursor
8. [DONE] AutoBugReport fires via ActionApi.OnFocusStealer inside step 6
9. [TODO] FireAutoHeal on restore timeout: after 5s exhausted, call FireAutoHeal(focus-theft, chromeHwnd) for AI triad analysis
10. [TODO] InputReadiness.Probe() before ask input -- currently EnsureCdpReadyAsync is manual partial substitute; OnProbeSuccess event (auto-hack) never fires
11. [TODO] prevFg re-capture between phases: persona inject / file attach / question send all use same initial snapshot
author: claude
